name: DW · Fact Purchase Order
sql:
SELECT
    gs                                                                          AS purchase_order_id,
    'PO-' || lpad(gs::text, 6, '0')                                            AS po_number,
    1 + (('x'||substr(md5('POSUP'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 150)::int      AS supplier_id,
    1 + (('x'||substr(md5('POEMP'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 300)::int      AS employee_id,
    (CURRENT_DATE - (('x'||substr(md5('PODATE'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 1095)::int) AS order_date,
    (ARRAY['Received','Received','Received','Open','Cancelled'])
        [1 + (('x'||substr(md5('POSTAT'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 5)::int] AS status,
    (ARRAY['Net 30','Net 45','Net 60','Prepaid'])
        [1 + (('x'||substr(md5('POTERM'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 4)::int] AS payment_terms
FROM generate_series(1, 2000) AS gs
